evals.prompt: Can you extract the brand guidelines and colors from https://firecrawl.dev?
evals.expected_output: A markdown document showing the Firecrawl logo, color palette (e.g. orange and dark gray), typography (Inter/Roboto), and component styles.

evals.prompt: I need the branding data for stripe.com including the typography they use and their main colors.
evals.expected_output: A markdown document showing Stripe's brand identity, specifically their known blurple/indigo colors and fonts.
